Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed in manuscripts that underwent major revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where the prior activity was SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include at least one reviewer decline
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time until SW-Awaiting EIC Decision is performed after the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-reviewer assignments
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in fast-track review paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants with no reviewer reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when the manuscript originated from a resubmission (e.g., after SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the time from RW-Reviewer Agreed to RW-Awaiting EIC Decision in revised submission tracks
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'RW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'RW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision following a sequence that includes Assign a Different Editor versus sequences without editor reassignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Assign a Different Editor' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Elapsed time between the final SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases with three or more reviewer invitations
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be reached after the first plagiarism check completion in standard review paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that did not trigger any checklist deadline reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
